body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49299", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "In OpenStack Neutron before 28.0.1, the tagging controller enforces plural policy action names on single-tag write operations while the defined policy rules use singular names. The mismatched names evaluate as allowed under the default policy, permitting a project reader to create and update tags on same-project resources. Deployments running Neutron 26.0.0 or later are affected.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00295, "percentile": 0.20966}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xv24-hxh9-2hh9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T18:50:58Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xv24-hxh9-2hh9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xv24-hxh9-2hh9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49299"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T22:17:02Z", "published_at": "2026-05-29T00:38:33Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-49299", "https://bugs.launchpad.net/bugs/2150132", "https://review.opendev.org/c/openstack/neutron/+/989099", "https://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/28/8", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/06/02/7", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xv24-hxh9-2hh9"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openstack/neutron", "summary": "OpenStack Neutron has an Incorrect Authorization issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T18:50:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xv24-hxh9-2hh9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "28.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "neutron"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 28.0.0, < 28.0.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "27.0.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "neutron"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 27.0.0, < 27.0.3"}, {"first_patched_version": "26.0.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "neutron"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 26.0.0, < 26.0.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
